description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a hip roof and a light beige brick exterior. The front facade features a central white door flanked by two large windows, and a paved walkway leads from the sidewalk to the entrance. To the right of the house, there is a driveway with two parked vehicles: a car and a van, both in light blue tones. The roof is a simple, low-pitched hip style in shades of gray, and the house sits on a neatly maintained green lawn. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, with additional windows on the sides. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of mid-20th-century suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story beige brick house with a hip roof, central front door, symmetrical windows, and a driveway with two vehicles on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large front windows, walkway, and driveway with two vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, windowless wall, the driveway, and the vehicles parked beside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three symmetrically placed windows and the hip roof, with the driveway and vehicles visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window and the continuation of the green lawn, with the front walkway and part of the driveway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central white door with a small paved walkway, no porch or overhang, flanked by two large windows.
